title: ASR Tactical EDC Mini Zipper Pull Folding Pocket Knife (2 Sizes, Colors)
description:
Keep a compact cutting tool within reach with the ASR Tactical Mini Zipper Folding Pocket Knife. Available in two sizes and two color options, this lightweight EDC knife features a durable stainless steel blade and folding design for safe storage and everyday convenience. Whether attached to a key ring, backpack, zipper pull or gear bag, this mini pocket knife is ready for opening packages, cutting cordage and handling small utility tasks. Offered in matte black or titanium silver finishes, each knife includes a built-in keychain attachment for convenient carry without adding unnecessary weight or bulk.

ASR Tactical Mini Zipper Stainless Steel Folding Pocket Knives EDC Gear Survival
The ASR Tactical Mini Zipper Folding Pocket Knife is a lightweight everyday carry tool designed for convenience, portability and reliable utility. Constructed from durable stainless steel, this compact folding knife delivers dependable cutting performance while maintaining an ultra-portable size that easily integrates into your EDC gear.

Designed for attachment to backpacks, zipper pulls, key rings, gear bags and belt loops, this mini folding knife provides quick access whenever small cutting tasks arise. The folding blade design helps protect the cutting edge when not in use while promoting safe storage and transport.

Ideal for opening packages, cutting rope, trimming cordage and handling everyday utility tasks, these compact knives provide practical functionality without adding bulk to your carry setup. Available in both matte black and titanium silver finishes, the minimalist design pairs durability with a sleek appearance suitable for everyday use.

Choose between two convenient sizes to fit your preferred carry style. Lightweight construction and integrated keychain attachment make these mini folding pocket knives a practical addition to keychains, backpacks, emergency kits, travel gear and everyday carry collections.
Key Features
  • COMPACT EDC DESIGN - Lightweight folding knife easily attaches to keychains, backpacks, zipper pulls and gear bags
  • DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL BLADE - Stainless steel construction provides dependable cutting performance for everyday utility tasks
  • TWO SIZE OPTIONS AVAILABLE - Choose from small or large configurations to match your preferred carry style
  • KEYCHAIN ATTACHMENT INCLUDED - Integrated attachment point allows convenient connection to keys and everyday gear
  • TWO FINISH OPTIONS - Available in matte black or titanium silver for a clean, modern appearance
Specifications
Thickness: 2.5mm
Carry Method: Keychain, Zipper Pull, Backpack Attachment
Intended Use: EDC, Travel, Utility, Emergency Preparedness
Small Dimensions (Open): 2.25" x .75" x .25"
Small Weight: .04lbs
Large Dimensions (Open): 2.62" x .75" x .25"
Large Weight: .06lbs
The ASR Tactical Mini Folding EDC Knife combines portability and utility in a compact design built for everyday carry. Featuring a stainless steel blade and lightweight construction, this folding pocket knife is available in two sizes and two finish options to suit a variety of carry preferences.

The compact profile makes it easy to attach to backpacks, key rings, zipper pulls and gear bags, keeping a cutting tool readily available for everyday tasks. A folding blade design promotes safe storage while maintaining quick accessibility when needed. Whether carried as part of an EDC setup, travel gear or emergency kit, this mini knife offers practical cutting performance in a lightweight and space-saving package.
